授業の概要・背景: Students will be working on a project and on critical thinking skills. These two targets will be taught hand-in-hand. Students will work on logical fallacies and cohesive devices, designed to improve report writing skills for the workplace.

第1回:
【Startup Week】 https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=5de86309-7370-4734-afff-b420006004c4https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=5de86309-7370-4734-afff-b420006004c4
"Online class（On-demand format）"／ 《90minutes》
This will include project management skills, time management skills, self-motivation techniques, as well as an outline of the course.
Each week, we will study a new logical fallacy in class. Students will be expected to write a summary of that logical fallacy and email it to the teacher.
